title: espeletia neriifolia
intro: Espeletia neriifolia is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Andean region of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Espeletia neriifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Espeletia neriifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused in oil, or made into a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
